title: Erase
body:
## NOT RECOMMENDED FOR GENERAL USE.

A mod that changes minecraft rendering types, by making it toggleable.
This is great if you are looking for an AFK Instance mod.

Features

The mod added toggling feature for minecraft' rendering features, which includes:
  • Skies and Fogs
  • InGame HUDs
  • GUIs
  • Particles
  • Entities
  • Lighting (Fullbright, causes issue when playing in singleplayer)
  • World Rendering

    • You can see more of them in the Gallery tab.

    Requires Sodium, and Cloth Config.

    Any issue may or may not be fixed because I lacked modding knowledge, sorry in advance.
